investigated: Pipeline calibration (seed-000), PEAD for mega-cap S&P 500 stocks with >10% EPS beats (seed-001), S&P 500 index addition effect (seed-002), FDA PDUFA decision literature review (seed-003)
findings: PIPELINE: Calibrated successfully - META Feb 2023 (+21.82% measured vs +23% actual), GOOGL Oct 2022 (-8.38% measured vs -9% actual), NVDA Feb 2024 (+14.33% measured vs +16% actual). All match expected direction and magnitude. PEAD DEAD END: No post-earnings drift for mega-cap S&P 500 with >10% EPS beats. Discovery set (2021-2022, n=20): avg 1d abnormal = +1.05%, positive rate = 45% (below random!), 1d→5d drift = -0.94% (mean reversion). Financials (GS/MS 2020-2021, n=13): avg 1d = +0.40%, drift = -1.50%. Not significant. 2023-2024 tech shows strong returns (+8.37%) but confounded by AI/META theme. INDEX ADDITION EFFECT CONFIRMED: Discovery (2020-2022, n=15): avg 1d abnormal = +4.09%, 5d = +5.52%, 73% positive rate. Validation (2023-2024, n=10): avg 1d = +8.05%, 5d = +10.23%, 100% positive rate. Both pass multiple testing. Hypothesis 061ae3a8 created (confidence 9/10). FDA LITERATURE: Effect size-dependent - large pharma approval near-zero (+0.4%), small biotech +8-11% vs pharma. Rejection (CRL) = -4.3% to -9.2%, asymmetrically larger. Continued drift for 2+ weeks post-rejection.
surprised_by: Two big surprises: (1) PEAD showed NEGATIVE abnormal returns on day 1 for large-cap beats (45% positive rate, below random). Classic 'sell the news' - these beats were fully priced in or exceeded by whisper numbers. (2) S&P 500 addition effect is CLEARLY ALIVE in 2020-2024 despite Greenwood & Sammon (2025 JF) claiming it disappeared by 2020. Validation set actually showed STRONGER effect than discovery (100% positive rate vs 73%). The growth of passive investing may be re-amplifying the forced buying effect. Need to monitor whether next non-thematic addition also shows the pattern.
next_step: Morning session: check if any March 2026 S&P 500 announcement was missed (Q1 rebalance may have just occurred). Research session: backtest FDA CRL rejection for small biotech (including delisted companies), test S&P 500 deletion effect, test post-effective-date reversal for additions. When next S&P 500 addition announced, place $5000 paper trade immediately.
